identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a distinct, high-trust B2B aesthetic that blends 'Scientific Precision' with 'Human Warmth'. Avoid generic SaaS tropes.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Architectural Precision with Organic Shapes.
Content is King: Every section tells a story of 'Smart Services, Balanced Lives'.
Negative Space: Use whitespace as a luxury element.
Contrast: High contrast for readability and authority.

usage_rules: Use Navy (#1A365B) for strong typographic hierarchy and footer backgrounds.
Use Green (#70E252) sparingly for CTAs and high-value accents (icons, progress bars).
Backgrounds should be primarily White (#FFFFFF) or very light Slate (#F8FAFC).
Avoid large blocks of Teal (#2B4F79); use it for secondary buttons or illustrations.

grid_system.description: Asymmetrical grid for services and features to create visual interest.

containers.hero_split: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[80vh]

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A365B] text-white hover:bg-[#2B4F79] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-[#70E252] text-[#0F291E] hover:bg-[#86EFAC] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1A365B] text-[#1A365B] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all

cards.service_card: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#70E252]/30 transition-all duration-300 group
cards.feature_card: bg-slate-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-transparent hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all

navbar.style: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-5xl bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 rounded-full shadow-sm z-50 px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between transition-all

visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle mesh gradients in backgrounds (Opacity 5-10%) using brand colors.

motion.entrance: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette and font family.
Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Navbar and Footer.
Use the Bento Grid strategy for the Services section.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use the specific image URLs provided for each section.
Strictly follow the Light Theme mandate (no dark mode toggle needed, enforce light mode in class strategy).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic gradients, centered text only).
Use Lucide React icons for UI elements.
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings; use 'Outfit'.
Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT use pure #000000; use #0F172A (Slate-900) for black.
